info.title: Segment Public API
info.description: The Segment Public API allows you to manage Segment Workspaces and their resources including Sources, Destinations, Warehouses, Spaces, and more.

get.description: Lists all Sources in the Workspace.

post.description: Creates a new Source in the Workspace.

get.description: Retrieves a specific Source by its identifier.

delete.description: Deletes a Source from the Workspace.

post.description: Adds existing labels to a Source.

put.description: Replaces all labels for a Source.

post.description: Creates a new write key for a Source.

delete.description: Removes a write key from a Source.

get.description: Lists all Destinations connected to a Source.
Lists all Warehouses connected to a Source.
Retrieves schema settings for a Source.

patch.description: Updates schema settings for a Source.

post.description: Creates a new Destination connected to a Source.

get.description: Lists all event subscriptions for a Destination.

post.description: Adds an event subscription to a Destination.

get.summary: List Delivery Metrics Summary from Destination
get.description: Retrieves delivery performance metrics for a Destination.

post.summary: Add Connection from Source to Warehouse
post.description: Connects a Source to a Warehouse.

delete.description: Disconnects a Source from a Warehouse.

get.description: Retrieves a specific space by its identifier.

post.summary: Batch Query Messaging Subscriptions for Space
post.description: Retrieves messaging subscription statuses for multiple recipients in a space.

put.description: Updates messaging subscription settings for a space.

tags.name: Spaces
tags.description: Manage Segment spaces and messaging subscriptions
